description:
While on holiday in Fiji, Sam loses his phone in excitement to meet his girlfriend Sheena. Sam purchases a new phone with a 3G connection, where he starts getting calls from an unknown number, receiving which shows video of a female being killed and her haunted face. Sam starts to lose his mind and also attacks Sheena while being possessed. When she finds out about the unknown caller and the video, they both try to solve the mystery, and they must face the unbelievable reality that the phone is somehow responsible for all that is happening to them and around them.
The only way to stay alive, it seems, is to unravel the mystery of the phone. But as the hours burn on, that becomes harder and harder to do.

description:
KADHAL KANAVE | காதல் கனவே
Viraj is enjoying his dream life in the US, but sudden visa troubles push him back to Ahmedabad. There, he crosses paths with Nivedita, an architecture student whose personality clashes with his in every way. As their worlds collide, Viraj finds himself at a crossroads—should he return to the life he built abroad, or stay back for what his heart is beginning to feel?

description:

description:

title: Badlapur Boys - விறுவிறுப்பான Sports Drama திரைப்படம்| Super Hit Cinema | Thanthi One | 20th October
description:
In the drought-hit village of Badlapur, Vijay dreams of saving his people from a severe water crisis. After his father’s tragic sacrifice goes unnoticed, Vijay grows up determined to make a difference. He forms a kabaddi team of underdogs, aiming to use the sport as a platform for change. Despite facing immense challenges, their courage and teamwork lead them to victory. Vijay’s ultimate sacrifice brings attention to the village’s plight, inspiring action and hope.

title: Killadi Raja - கலகலப்பான Action திரைப்படம்🎞️ |  Super Hit Cinema |  Thanthi One | 19th May 2025
description:
In a bid to prove his worth to his disapproving father, a determined young man takes on a bizarre challenge - arranging the marriage of Indu, the rebellious sister of feared underworld don TT Bhai, to a fearless cop named Bahattar Singh, also known as Khiladi 786, in Punjab. To make the deal more convincing, he even persuades TT Bhai to pose as a police officer. However, chaos ensues when it's revealed that Bahattar Singh, along with his father Sattar Singh and uncle Ikhattar Singh, are not real cops but a family of smooth-talking conmen. As deception unfolds and identities unravel, the mission spirals into a hilarious rollercoaster of action, romance, and mistaken identities.
